title: Parkio Daily for July 16, 2026
teaser: Magic of Disney Animation opens this fall at Hollywood Studios; Tiki Terrace returns October at Polynesian; fire incident at Yacht Club resolved.

rides.name: Soarin'
rides.note: Walk-on windows likely between 6–7pm during dinner hour

rides.name: Big Thunder Mountain Railroad
rides.note: Early morning waits tend to stay under 25 minutes

rides.name: Pirates of the Caribbean
rides.note: New tavern lounge testing walk-up access soon

breaking.title: Fire incident at Yacht Club Resort resolved
breaking.body: A fire occurred at Disney's Yacht Club Resort on the morning of July 15. The situation has been contained and the resort remains operational.

parkioInsight.text: Yacht Club operations appear normal today. If staying there, confirm any area restrictions with the front desk before heading to your room.

bignews.title: Magic of Disney Animation sets fall 2026 opening at Hollywood Studios
bignews.body: The new Magic of Disney Animation experience in the reimagined courtyard at Hollywood Studios will debut this fall. Disney announced the opening window for the immersive walk-through that brings animation characters into the real world.

parkioInsight.text: Soft openings often start weeks before official debut. Check the courtyard area near Animation Hall in late August or early September for preview access.

bignews.title: Trader Sam's Tiki Terrace reopening in October at Polynesian
bignews.body: The outdoor bar at Disney's Polynesian Village Resort will reopen in October after an extended closure. The lounge serves tropical drinks and light bites on the terrace overlooking Seven Seas Lagoon.

parkioInsight.text: Tiki Terrace typically fills fast at sunset. Arrive by 5pm on reopening week to claim a table with Magic Kingdom fireworks views across the lagoon.

bignews.title: Four new DOLE Whip flavors arrive at Disney parks
bignews.body: Disney has introduced four new DOLE Whip varieties across locations at Walt Disney World and Disneyland Resort. The additions expand the frozen treat lineup ahead of DOLE Whip Day on July 17.

parkioInsight.text: DOLE Whip stands tend to see longer lines after 1pm in summer heat. Stop by Aloha Isle or Tiki Juice Bar before 11am to sample new flavors with minimal wait.

bignews.title: Earl of Sandwich opens permanent location at Disneyland Resort
bignews.body: The popular sandwich counter has found a permanent home at Disneyland Resort after operating from temporary spots. The location is now open in Downtown Disney District.

parkioInsight.text: Downtown Disney dining peaks during park closing hours. Visit Earl of Sandwich mid-afternoon for faster counter service and easier seating.

topstories.title: Walk-up waitlist briefly appeared for Spaceship Earth and Pirates lounges
topstories.body: The My Disney Experience app temporarily displayed walk-up waitlist options for the GEO-82 lounge inside Spaceship Earth and the Beak and Barrel tavern at Pirates of the Caribbean. Both features were removed shortly after appearing, suggesting reservation-free access may launch soon.

parkioInsight.text: If walk-up access launches, both lounges likely fill fastest between 7–9pm. Try joining a waitlist during late afternoon or post-fireworks for shorter holds.

topstories.title: Germany Pavilion at EPCOT remains partially closed
topstories.body: Construction walls continue to surround portions of the Germany Pavilion at World Showcase. Some shops and pathways remain inaccessible while Disney completes maintenance work.

parkioInsight.text: Germany shopping and some food access remain limited. Plan your World Showcase lap to visit neighboring Italy or China pavilions for full retail and dining options.

topstories.title: Animal Kingdom entrance repaving underway
topstories.body: Green construction walls have appeared at the main guest entrance to Disney's Animal Kingdom as crews begin repaving the arrival plaza. The work is expected to continue for several weeks.

parkioInsight.text: Entry flow may be tighter during peak morning arrival. Arriving by 8:30am or after 10am tends to avoid the heaviest gate congestion during construction.

topstories.title: Fort Wilderness debuts refreshed pool and lobby
topstories.body: Disney's Fort Wilderness Resort has completed renovation of its pool area and main lobby. The updates bring new seating, landscaping, and decor to the lakeside campground resort.

parkioInsight.text: Fort Wilderness boat dock offers a scenic, crowd-free route to Magic Kingdom. The new pool area makes a relaxing mid-day retreat if staying on property.

topstories.title: Cinderella Castle Suite stay available through charity sweepstakes
topstories.body: Disney is offering a night in the exclusive Cinderella Castle Suite at Magic Kingdom through a charitable donation sweepstakes. Entries are accepted online with proceeds benefiting a designated nonprofit.

parkioInsight.text: The suite sits above Cinderella's Royal Table. If you enter the sweepstakes, booking a late dinner reservation lets you scout the castle interior while you wait for results.

topstories.title: Disneyland fireworks ban extended due to heat
topstories.body: Disney has prolonged the suspension of nighttime fireworks at Disneyland Resort after local authorities extended a pyrotechnics ban originally set to expire July 15. Extreme temperatures prompted the continued restriction.

parkioInsight.text: Without fireworks, Main Street USA and castle hub crowds tend to thin by 9pm. Use that window for walk-on access to Peter Pan or Matterhorn before park close.

topstories.title: Yzma character may debut at Oogie Boogie Bash this fall
topstories.body: Disney teased a new Villains Treat Trail for the 2026 Oogie Boogie Bash Halloween party at Disneyland, with promotional material hinting at the debut of Yzma from The Emperor's New Groove.

parkioInsight.text: New character meet-and-greets at Oogie Boogie Bash often draw hour-plus waits on opening night. Attending mid-run dates in September usually shortens character queues.

icymi.title: New Animal Kingdom Lodge merchandise collection released
icymi.body: A resort-specific apparel and home goods line featuring Disney's Animal Kingdom Lodge branding is now available at Zawadi Marketplace. Items include hoodies, tees, and decor.

icymi.title: Disneyland price increases hit hundreds of menu items
icymi.body: Disney has raised prices on hundreds of food and beverage items across Disneyland, California Adventure, and resort hotels. The adjustments cover entrees, snacks, desserts, and drinks.

icymi.title: Halloween Loungefly collection launches online
icymi.body: A new Halloween-themed Loungefly line featuring The Aristocats has been released on shopDisney. The pink collection includes backpacks, wallets, and accessories.

spotlight.title: Sleeping Beauty Castle snow globe and new Disneyland merch arrive
spotlight.body: A light-up Sleeping Beauty Castle snow globe, character figures, and a Toy Story 5 kids suitcase are now available at Downtown Disney and select Disneyland shops. The castle globe retails for 99 dollars and features detailed interior scenes.

parkioInsight.text: Castle-themed home goods tend to sell out quickly during summer vacation weeks. Visit Disney Home or World of Disney before noon to find the fullest selection.
